review_title: Powerful database tool to track and secure database access
description: DBHawk allows us to centralize the access to all of our production databases, and to track SQL activities per user in a very secured way. this tool is much more secured and much more suitable than classical SQL clients to track and secure production data fixing activities.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Multiple database platforms - Web User Interface - LDAP(s) integration in front of database access (users do not have to know the database user and password to connect) - Strong 2-factor Authentication - Connections and queries per user tracking (perfect for production data fixing) - Powerful SQL editor - Powerful dashboards - Queries saving and sharing
cons: Nothing ! It's just perfect for our requirement !
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: DBHawk is amazingly versatile software. It is easy to setup and very easy to use. Users love it.
description: More users have access to the data in a much easier way than ever before. Dashboards and snippets are very user friendly. We save a lot of time since the application is web-based, we don't need to install the DB client software on each machine. User access control - we can easily see and control who-access-what. Great technical support. In case of any technical issue, we have received almost immediate response and fast solution. All databases at one place.
author: Timotej M.
pros: It is supporting multiple database platforms, hence we don't need to switch between several Database clients. We can easily create snippets and share some access to the NON DBHAWK users in other departments. It is great, that we have one platform, that can be used inside of our company as well as outside - when connected on mobile device (iPad) via VPN. System is fast and reliable, it keeps the history of the queries, so can get back to your previous work easily. Inbuilt scheduler, TABLE import /export provides very agile scheduled system - we have replaced our customer build application with this feature. Dashboard is simply amazing. By couple of clicks you can create amazing GRAPHICAL presentation of your data - basically simple BI system. READ access to the DB - as simple as 1 click - you can define a database connection as read only without actually touching the DB user itself. This is great feature which we use when granting access to the Database to the non-technical people. User access control in general is very easy in DBHawk. Saves us a lot of time. Web-Based interface is saving us a lot of time with the local application setup. Everything is managed centrally and we can easily see, which use is working on what query. The queries can be shared. Great value for the money.
cons: since it is web-based, there are some limitations defined by the browser - if by any accident the user press REFRESH WEBPAGE (or F5), the DBHawk gets refreshed and you may loose you recent work. Or in case you are using iPad with external keyboard, it is a bit harder to navigate through the SQL code with arrows. We are dependent on the availability of the server. Running a SQL PLUS code on the ORACLE database is a bit tricky, to get a spool file that is generated by the query is not really straight forward thing, but it works.

review_title: Easy to search and locate data you need.
author: Raynald M.
pros: Multiple Database Platform Support both SQL and NO SQL Robust Access Management Including 2 Factor Authentication LDAP Integration Intuitive UI All settings are configurable even logo branding.
cons: Not configurable with IIS, IIS is used by a wide variety of industries and it is not going anywhere. Need Java SSL Implementation is complexe.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: DBHawk is an easy to use WEB based tool for accessing internal databases
author: Stefan L.
pros: We use DBHawk for administrating our Oracle databases as well as a reporting and data analysis tool since 2011. We mostly like the ease of use for our daily tasks like resizing data files, managing tablespaces or managing user credentials. The integrated schema and data browser helps us a lot analyzing data and finding errors.

review_title: The software provided the web based, controlled access to the dbs that we needed.
description: Good security as well as a single access point to multiple data stores.
author: Robi D.
pros: The controlled access. The ability to create a fairly granular access account that is outside of the db security. This means the account used within the application can not be used to access the database directly. I also appreciated and needed multiple database access. We support relational and nosql databases, having one tool saves a lot of time.
cons: Deciding on the access method was a little complicated. The added flexibility increased the complexity.

review_title: Easiest way to connect to tables in database
author: Joseph N.
pros: Been using this software for several years and appreciate ease of use and quality. Connects easily to our Oracle tables and allows us to pull in information quickly and easily. Highly recommended. Tech support (Shah and Manish) are the best there is.
cons: Nothing. Its a great piece of software that keeps improving with each new update. Installation is straight forward.

review_title: DBHawk is a great tool to manage our database platforms through web console .
description: Open database in web browser and edit data like a form , less or no knowledge required to operate it , query in web and lot's of benefits.
author: Debasis S.
pros: Multiple Database Platform Support both SQL and NOSQL, Robust Access Management including 2 Factor Auth LDAP Integration , Intuitive UI , All settings are configurable even logo branding , No more SSMS just web browser can open and run in Linux , Mac and Windows.
cons: Cannot configurable for IIS , need JAVA and SSL implementation is tricky , as one single login used for data source so who ever used it shows that connection.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: DBHawk provided a HTTPS-secured browser-based user interface for 3rd-party access to an internal DB.
author: Nathan R.
pros: The granular access control for a given account and the graphical user interface is designed to be intuitive.
